arguments.answer:
The function to find the position of the last removed element from the given array is defined as follows: def get_last_occurrence(arr, target):
    for i in range(len(arr)-1, -1, -1):
        if arr[i] == target:
            return i

# Test cases
assert get_last_occurrence([2,5,4], 3) == -1
assert get_last_occurrence([4,3], 2) == 2
assert get_last_occurrence([1,2,3,4], 4) == 4
